name: historical
description: Get historical weather data from Open-Meteo Historical Archive API. Access ERA5 reanalysis data from 1940 to present with ~5 day lag.

hourly.description: Hourly variables. Options: temperature_2m, relative_humidity_2m, dewpoint_2m, apparent_temperature, precipitation, rain, snowfall, snow_depth, weather_code, pressure_msl, surface_pressure, cloud_cover, wind_speed_10m, wind_direction_10m, wind_gusts_10m, shortwave_radiation, direct_radiation, diffuse_radiation, sunshine_duration, is_day

daily.description: Daily variables. Options: weather_code, temperature_2m_max, temperature_2m_min, apparent_temperature_max, apparent_temperature_min, sunrise, sunset, daylight_duration, sunshine_duration, precipitation_sum, rain_sum, snowfall_sum, precipitation_hours, wind_speed_10m_max, wind_gusts_10m_max, wind_direction_10m_dominant, shortwave_radiation_sum, et0_fao_evapotranspiration

timezone.description: IANA timezone string or 'auto'. REQUIRED when using daily variables.
